The task is a **refactor** (extract magic values to named constants). The two changes are:
1. In `Controllers/FilesController.cs`: Extract `"application/octet-stream"` to a `private const string DefaultContentType = "application/octet-stream";`
2. In `Program.cs`: Extract `"FileService"` section name to a `const string FileServiceSectionName = "FileService";`, preferred to put on `Configuration/FileServiceOptions.cs` as `public const string SectionName = "FileService";`

The existing tests already cover most of the behavior:
- `FilesControllerTests.cs` covers the Download endpoint's content-type behavior including the octet-stream fallback (e.g., `Download_UsesOctetStream_WhenContentTypeUnknown`, `Download_UsesOctetStream_ForVariousUnknownExtensions`).
- `ProgramWiringTests.cs` covers the `GetSection("FileService")` call via source parsing (the `FileServiceSectionPattern` matches `GetSection\s*\(\s*""FileService""\s*\)`).

   private static string FileServiceOptionsSource { get; } =
       SourceFileLoader.LoadAdjacent("Configuration", "FileServiceOptions.cs");

   /// <summary>
   /// Resolves the effective configuration section name passed to
   /// GetSection inside the Configure<FileServiceOptions> call. Handles
   /// both the inline literal form (GetSection("FileService")) and the
   /// extracted-constant form (GetSection(SomeOptions.SectionName)), so the
   /// characterization survives the magic-value extraction refactor.
   /// </summary>
   private static string ResolveSectionName()
   {
       var match = Regex.Match(ProgramSource, AnyGetSectionPattern);
       Assert.True(match.Success, "Expected a GetSection(...) call in Program.cs.");
       var arg = match.Groups[1].Value.Trim();

       var literal = Regex.Match(arg, "^\"([^\"]*)\"$");
       if (literal.Success)
       {
           return literal.Groups[1].Value;
       }

       // Constant reference: resolve the declared value from Program.cs or
       // FileServiceOptions.cs (e.g. `const string SectionName = "FileService"`).
       var constName = arg.Split('.').Last().Trim();
       foreach (var source in new[] { ProgramSource, FileServiceOptionsSource })
       {
           var decl = Regex.Match(source,
               @"const\s+string\s+" + Regex.Escape(constName) + @"\s*=\s*""([^""]*)""");
           if (decl.Success)
           {
               return decl.Groups[1].Value;
           }
       }

       return arg; // unresolved → assertion will fail with a clear diff
   }
